query: Audit our GitHub Actions, Dockerfile, and repository settings against Singapore Government SD-1..SD-10 and SC-1..SC-9, with pass/fail findings and concrete fixes.
Set up a new agency repository with push protection, protected branches, required tests and reviews, SAST, SCA, DAST, SBOMs, signed artifacts, OIDC, and environment segregation.
Our workflow uses mutable action tags, npm install, long-lived AWS keys, and an unsigned image deployed straight to production. Rewrite it with SD/SC control traceability.
Design a GitLab CI pipeline for a government service using protected branches and environments, secret detection, SAST/IaC/SCA/DAST, provenance, signing, verification, and SSP scan parameters.
The team builds official releases on a laptop from a personal GitHub repository. Move it to a sanctioned central platform with reproducible CI builds, provenance, and peer review.
Create an SSDLC adoption plan under SD-10 and show how threat modelling, security requirements, code review, automated gates, release evidence, and vulnerability feedback fit the lifecycle.
Add DAST to our staging pipeline using the SSP-defined location and frequency, block unsafe production promotion, and preserve evidence for an ICT&SS audit.
Set up an InnerSource workflow for reusable agency components under SC-9: sanctioned hosting, maintainers, contribution policy, review, issue tracking, versioning, and secure releases.
Review whether our test command can be bypassed with '|| true', whether approvals dismiss on new commits, and whether staging and production share credentials or data.
Prepare CI/CD evidence for an SSP review, including every SD and SC control, unresolved agency parameters, repo settings, workflows, artifact records, and exceptions.
Fix SQL injection, weak hashing, unsafe sessions, CSP, HSTS, file uploads, and hardcoded application secrets.
Harden a Dockerfile and Kubernetes Deployment under CS-1 through CS-11, including private registries and runtime protection.
Perform an independent penetration test, publish security.txt, enable host scans and CSPM, and track remediation SLAs.
Set up a simple GitHub Actions workflow that runs npm test for my personal open-source toy project. There is no government or compliance context.
Review IAM least privilege, MFA, dormant accounts, access reviews, SSO, SCIM, and managed endpoints.
Design VPC segmentation, WAF, private endpoints, hybrid connectivity, IDS, VPN, and firewall alerts.
Configure immutable backups, recovery tests, RTO/RPO, multi-AZ failover, autoscaling, and load testing.
Audit CloudTrail, VPC Flow Logs, database logs, GCSOC forwarding, retention, sanitisation, and UEBA.
Our CI artifact store and SBOM bucket replicate to us-east-1. Enforce Singapore data residency and encryption at rest for the stored build artifacts.
Determine which cybersecurity SSP applies and list its Level 0, Level 1, and Level 2 controls.
